items.caption: A close-up of a vehicle's rear window with a decal applied to it. the decal features a symbol commonly associated with biohazard, which is a stylized representation of a virus or bacteria. the text overlay on the image provides information about the decal, stating it is a "limited edition vinyl decal design" made with "oracal 651 vinyl." it is a "professional grade" decal that is "semi-permanent" and available in various colors. the text also mentions that it is made in texas. the background of the image is not clearly visible, but the focus is on the decal and the text providing details about the product.
